# Architecture

[README.md](../README.md) documents the main use cases and philosophy that guide the design of photree.

For the Image Capture file structure and iOS album on-disk layout, see [internals.md](./internals.md).

## Package Layout

photree follows a flat package layout with the following top-level modules:

- `cli/` — Typer-based CLI entry point and command definitions

<!-- BEGIN MODULE OVERVIEW (auto-generated by: mise run depgraph — do not edit manually) -->
## Module Overview

Dependencies between top-level modules (auto-generated via `mise run depgraph`):
```mermaid
graph TD
    album["album/"]
    albums["albums/"]
    check["check/"]
    cli["cli/"]
    clihelpers["clihelpers/"]
    common["common/"]
    config["config/"]
    demo["demo/"]
    fsprotocol["fsprotocol"]
    gallery["gallery/"]

    album --> clihelpers
    album --> common
    album --> config
    album --> fsprotocol
    albums --> album
    albums --> clihelpers
    albums --> common
    albums --> config
    albums --> fsprotocol
    check --> album
    check --> clihelpers
    cli --> album
    cli --> albums
    cli --> check
    cli --> demo
    cli --> gallery
    clihelpers --> common
    clihelpers --> fsprotocol
    config --> fsprotocol
    demo --> album
    gallery --> album
    gallery --> albums
    gallery --> clihelpers
    gallery --> common
    gallery --> config
    gallery --> fsprotocol
```
<!-- END MODULE OVERVIEW -->
